summary: Debutants who deserve respect — a vertical, counter-attacking 4-2-3-1 / 4-3-3 with set-play output. They topped a group with Cameroon.
style: 4-2-3-1 / 4-3-3 — vertical play & counter-attacking pace, nice rotations (FB, CAM and LW), set-play output.
strengths: Nice attacking rotations between fullback, CAM and LW

keyPlayers.name: Dailon Livramento
keyPlayers.note: Pace on the counter — top-scorer in qualifying

tactics: Break vertically with pace, rotate cleverly in the final third, and threaten from set-plays. Monteiro & Livramento are key. They topped a group with Cameroon — treat them as a quality CAF side.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
